description: Style Notetonga delivers a great range of choices for the young fashionable woman. Colour-pops and unique designs add a playful edge to day-wear. Sweet hues and romantic trends bring out the best in you. So grab your favourite piece today before they run out!Product DetailsCrafted in fine fabric and featuring a round neckline, this cream and brown dress has an empire waist and a zip at the backMaterial and CareShell 86% polyester, 10% 100% viscose and 4% elastane with a lining of 100% polyesterHand wash coldDo not bleachHang or line drySize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
